privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world TLE (Two-Line Element) datasets from Celestrak. It explicitly requires setting up a new ground station for Manhattan, NY at coordinates 40.7580 N, -73.9855 W with an altitude of 50m. The task also dictates tracking four specific satellites identified by NORAD IDs: 27607 (SO-50), 39444 (AO-73), 40967 (AO-85), and 25544 (ISS). Furthermore, the required global minimum elevation is strictly enforced at 45 degrees.
